mission.title: serverless-workflow: Replace JSONPath with 'jq'
mission.description: Replace JSONPath with 'jq'. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current serverless-workflow deployment
steps.description:
Verify your serverless-workflow version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
helm list -n serverless-workflow 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working serverless-workflow installation.

steps.title: Review serverless-workflow configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant serverless-workflow configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
kubectl get configmap -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=serverless-workflow
```
**What would you like to be added**:

Replace JSONPath with [`jq`](https://stedolan.github.io/jq/) for all [Workflow Data Expressions](https://github.com/serverlessworkflow/specification/blob/master/specification.md#Workflow-Data-Expressions).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Replace JSONPath with 'jq'
steps.description:
* replaces jsonpath with jq
* updates expressions syntax
```yaml
{
	"name": "Alan"
}
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
kubectl get events -n serverless-workflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Replace JSONPath with 'jq'" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
* replaces jsonpath with jq
* updates expressions syntax
codeSnippets:
id: helloworld
name: "Hello, World!"
states:
- name: Hello
  type: inject
  data:
    output:
      greeting: "Hello, {{ $.name }}!"
  start:
    kind: default
  end:
    kind: default
  stateDataFilter:
    dataOutputPath: "$.output"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with serverless-workflow installed or the issue environment reproducible.
